name: Ausiello's Homeslice
tagline: Wood-fired pizzas, shareable plates and craft cocktails in Santa Rosa's Rincon Valley.
seoDescription: Ausiello's Homeslice in Santa Rosa: a family-run restaurant and full bar serving wood-fired pizza, smash burgers and craft cocktails.

contact.address: 5755 Mountain Hawk Drive, Santa Rosa, CA, 95409

hero.heading: Wood-Fired Pizza and Cocktails
hero.subheading: A neighborhood restaurant and full bar from the Ausiello family, serving wood-fired pizzas, smash burgers and shareable plates in Rincon Valley, Santa Rosa.

highlights: Wood-fired oven pizzas with a crispy, browned crust
Full bar with a cocktail-forward, family-friendly atmosphere
Run by the Ausiello family, longtime Santa Rosa restaurateurs

about.heading: About Ausiello's Homeslice
body: The Ausiello family migrated to the North Bay in 1998 and ran a downtown Santa Rosa bar and grill for more than 23 years before opening Homeslice. In late 2023 they brought their hospitality to the Rincon Valley neighborhood at 5755 Mountain Hawk Drive.

Homeslice is a local, cocktail-forward restaurant and full bar built around wood-fired oven pizzas, smash burgers, house-made plates and a rotating menu of handcrafted drinks, served in a friendly and familiar atmosphere.

services.title: Wood-Fired Pizza
services.description: Pizzas baked in a wood-fired oven for a crispy, browned crust, with varieties like Margherita, pesto and mushroom, and Korean short rib.

services.title: Shareable Plates
services.description: Starters and small plates such as Grandma's meatballs, crispy Brussels sprouts, hot cheese dip and crispy rice with ahi tartare.

services.title: Burgers & Sandwiches
services.description: Fan favorites including the smash burger and a crispy chicken sandwich with tangy slaw and kimchi mayo.

services.title: Pasta
services.description: House pasta dishes such as stuffed shells with herb ricotta and roasted garlic pesto.

services.title: Craft Cocktails & Full Bar
services.description: A cocktail-forward full bar with classic and contemporary handcrafted drinks.

services.title: Happy Hour
services.description: Daily happy hour with food and drink specials in a relaxed, family-friendly setting.

items.a: You'll find us at 5755 Mountain Hawk Drive, Santa Rosa, CA, 95409.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 595-3923 — we're glad to help.
